nav.logo_tagline: A ministry of Igreja ONDA DURA

hero.badge: 🌍 Free Resources for Immigrants in Portugal
hero.heading: The HOPE that dwells within us, shared with those in need.
hero.subtitle: This HOPE's section that brings together essential public information, social services, and community resources across 10 life categories — in one place, free, for everyone.

categories_section.heading: Here you can find everything you need.
categories_section.subtitle: Choose a category to explore verified resources, organizations, and contacts available to help you.

about_strip.heading: Why HOPE?
about_strip.body: Navigating a new country is challenging. Finding the right help shouldn't be. This HOPE page centralizes public information from government agencies, NGOs, and community organizations so you can focus on building your life.
about_strip.feature_free_text: Every resource is free to access, always.

search.page_subtitle: Search across all categories to find the help you need.
search.placeholder: Search by name, organization, or keyword...
search.no_results_body: Try a different search term or remove some filters.

about.cta_body: Browse our resource categories and find the support you need today.
about.feature_free_desc: All information is free to access, always. No registration required.
about.feature_verified_desc: Resources sourced from official government, NGO, and community organizations.
about.feature_multilang_desc: Resources from organizations serving users in many languages.
about.feature_updated_desc: Our team continuously adds and verifies resources to keep the information current.
about.feature_privacy_desc: No tracking, no registration, no data collection. Your privacy matters.
about.feature_mobile_desc: Optimized for mobile and desktop — use it wherever you are.

category_page.no_resources_body: Resources for this category will be added soon.

footer.logo_tagline: A ministry of Igreja ONDA DURA
footer.tagline: This HOPE's section that brings together essential public information, social services, and community resources across 10 life categories — in one place, free, for everyone.
footer.copyright: © {year} HOPE – Immigrant Resource Hub. Free to use.
footer.built_with: Built with ❤️ for immigrants in Portugal

static_categories.food-desc: Food banks, emergency food assistance, and basic supplies.
static_categories.health-desc: Healthcare, mental health, and wellness services.
static_categories.documentation-desc: Residence permits, visas, and legal status.
static_categories.financial-support-desc: Social benefits and emergency financial aid.
static_categories.domestic-violence-desc: Emergency support, shelters, and legal help.
static_categories.general-services-desc: Translation, legal aid, and community centers.
